message:
fix: add ROLLBACK on failed FTS rebuild to prevent dangling transactions

If an INSERT batch failed after BEGIN, the transaction was left open
with no ROLLBACK, leaving the connection in a broken state for
subsequent operations. Now:
- FrankenStorage::rebuild_fts() wraps loop in closure, ROLLBACKs on Err
- Doctor path issues ROLLBACK in the error handler
- "Complete" log only fires on success, not after rollback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
